title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration: use Ollama models as LLMs, chat or embedding endpoints in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, dark/light themes).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, streaming, POJO mapping.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST API with idiomatic Ruby objects and blocks.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Rust: chat, model switching, syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter that exposes OpenAI-compatible endpoints backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API for chatting with Ollama models; includes admin UI and rate-limiting.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, dependency injection helpers, and MAUI sample.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official NPM package providing JavaScript/TypeScript bindings for the Ollama API.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official PyPI package: Python client library for Ollama with sync & async support.

title: r/ollama – Local LLM ecosystem discussion
summary: Active subreddit for sharing tools, integrations, model tips and troubleshooting Ollama.
